svg.title: Phase 4 RAG system design diagram
svg.desc: Two-phase diagram: Setup Phase builds the FAISS index from policy documents, Runtime Phase evaluates each transcript utterance against policies using FAISS and an LLM.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I tag each policy with one of these 5 categories?')
sendPrompt('What do the fake policy text files look like?')
sendPrompt('When should I chunk policies and when should I skip it?')
g.text: Skip if rules are short bullets

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why must I use the same embedding model in both phases?')
sendPrompt('What exactly is stored in the FAISS index?')
sendPrompt('What does the fake transcript JSON look like?')
sendPrompt('Why do I embed the utterance with the same model used in setup?')
sendPrompt('What does top-k=3 mean and how do I choose k?')
sendPrompt('How do I convert FAISS indices back to policy text?')
sendPrompt('What threshold value should I use for confidence?')
sendPrompt('What does the exact prompt to Llama 4 Scout look like?')
sendPrompt('Show me an example JSON output for one utterance verdict')
sendPrompt('How do I aggregate per-utterance results into a call-level score for Phase 5?')
